SkyyRose Oakland Luxury
Story Collections Lookbook Craft Community

Oakland · Est. 2020 · Gender Neutral

SkyyRose

Luxury Grows from Concrete. Three collections, one vision — built by a father, named after a daughter.

Explore Collections Our Story
Scroll

As Featured In

Maxim CEO Weekly San Francisco Post Best of Best Review The Blox
Black Rose Love Hurts Signature Oakland Made Gender Neutral Limited Edition Luxury Streetwear Built Different Black Rose Love Hurts Signature Oakland Made Gender Neutral Limited Edition Luxury Streetwear Built Different

The Origin

Born In
The Town A father's promise. A daughter's name.

In a neighborhood where opportunities are as scarce as support, Corey Foster refused to become another statistic. He'd lost everything — broke, no drive left, a baby on the way.

Through failed websites, scammer manufacturers, and single parenthood with no support — he built something real. Named after his daughter Skyy Rose. Designed for anyone, regardless of gender or age.

SkyyRose isn't just clothing. It's proof that your circumstances don't define your destination.

Recognition
Best Oakland
Clothing Line 2024
“
“If you asked me four years ago, I never would have thought I’d be here. I had no drive, lost it all, a baby on the way, and was broke. But we knew we had to get it by any means necessary.”

— Corey Foster, Founder & CEO

The Lookbook

Worn In The Real World

Real people. Real style. Oakland made.

Love Hurts
Black Rose
Street Style
Signature
Limited Edition

The Craft

Every stitch, every fabric, every detail — intentional.

Premium Materials

280-400gsm cotton. Italian wool blends. Full-grain leather. No shortcuts.

Oakland Made Mentality

Born from the struggle of East Oakland. Designed for the world. Built to last generations.

Gender Neutral

Pioneer in Oakland gender-neutral fashion. Designed for anyone, regardless of gender or age.

Limited Editions

Small batch production. Individually numbered. When it's gone, it's gone.

Join the Movement

For The Real Ones

Early access to drops. Behind-the-scenes from Oakland. Stories that matter. No spam, just substance.

Free to join · Unsubscribe anytime · Oakland love only

SkyyRose

Where Oakland authenticity meets high-fashion aesthetics. Gender-neutral, sustainably crafted, limited edition designs. Built by a father, named after a daughter.

Maxim's 14 Game-Changing Entrepreneurs 2023 Best Oakland Clothing Line 2024 Featured — San Francisco Post, CEO Weekly

Made in Oakland

Size Guide

All measurements in inches

Size Chest Waist Length Sleeve
XS 34 28 27 32
S 36 30 28 33
M 38 32 29 34
L 40 34 30 35
XL 42 36 31 35.5
2XL 44 38 32 36
Size Waist Hip Inseam Length
XS 28 34 30 38
S 30 36 31 39
M 32 38 32 40
L 34 40 32 41
XL 36 42 33 42
2XL 38 44 33 43
Size Age Chest Waist Height
2T 2 21 20 33-36
3T 3 22 20.5 36-39
4T 4 23 21 39-42
5 5-6 24 21.5 42-45
6 6-7 25 22 45-48

How to Measure

  • Chest: Measure around the fullest part, keeping the tape level.
  • Waist: Measure around your natural waistline, just above the navel.
  • Hip: Measure around the widest part of your hips.
  • Inseam: Measure from the crotch seam to the ankle bone.

Cookies keep this site fast and personal. Stay to accept, or read how we handle your data.
